data.content: Implementation review rejected: make sanity fails on app::tests_hierarchy::deferred_descendant_is_cascaded_in_terminal_transition because a terminal cascade still rejects deferred descendants with 'deferred knots may only resume to implementation'. The cascade path in src/app.rs still calls write_state_change_locked for descendants without bypassing the deferred resume guard, so the parent terminal transition does not cascade to deferred children as required.
